p1.physical_facts: Yellow pot, dense foliage, stable posture.
p1.explanatory_transformations: Maintained consistent turgidity throughout the 5-day sequence; no significant leaf drop or color shift observed.
p1.visual_health_reasoning: Healthy; resilience to VPD stress confirmed by stable leaf orientation.

p2.physical_facts: Black pot, two primary leaves, one secondary pair.
p2.explanatory_transformations: Leaf margins show persistent dehydration; no recovery despite environmental adjustments.
p2.visual_health_reasoning: Stressed; persistent margin necrosis and drooping indicate root-zone issues or VPD-induced transpiration imbalance.

p3.physical_facts: Black pot, 2 leaves, white rabbit anchor present.
p3.explanatory_transformations: Tip necrosis on the larger leaf has remained static since T-5; no further degradation.
p3.visual_health_reasoning: Stable; tip necrosis is likely a legacy effect of previous VPD spikes.

p4.physical_facts: Black pot, small seedling near rim.
p4.explanatory_transformations: Growth remains minimal; seedling posture is static.
p4.visual_health_reasoning: Stressed; lack of developmental progress suggests limited nutrient uptake or environmental inhibition.

biome_observations.soil_surface: White particulate matter (perlite/amendment) observed in T-5 to T-1; consistent with user-applied soil care.
biome_observations.desk_surface: No debris or fungal growth detected.

temporal_deltas.T_minus_5_to_T_minus_1: Introduction of white soil amendments observed at T-5; soil moisture appears visually consistent across the sequence.
temporal_deltas.current_status: Post-powercut recovery; AC restart pending. No immediate visual change in plant turgidity following the powercut event.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of 'Stagnant Stress'. While p1 and p3 are holding steady, p2 and p4 show no signs of recovery. The white material on the soil is confirmed as a successful user-led amendment.
anomalies: p2 leaf margin necrosis persists despite soil amendments.
p4 seedling shows no growth trajectory over the 5-day observation window.
vision_report.narrative_description: The garden is currently stable but underperforming. The white soil amendments (perlite) are present and correctly placed. The primary concern remains the lack of recovery in p2 and p4. The recent powercut and subsequent AC restart have not yet manifested in visible physiological changes. The environment is currently holding at a baseline of moderate stress.
